title: Koifish
body: # 🐟 Koifish🐟 An adorable mod that adds Kois to Minecraft! --- **What does this mod add?** 🐠 Koifish Variants: Colorful koi that spawn naturally in river biomes. 🐟 Koifish Bucket: Capture your Kois in a bucket and release them wherever you like. 🍽️ Raw & Cooked Koi: Harvest your Kois and cook them in a furnace, smoker, or campfire. 🎨 Custom Textures: Each Koifish variant is uniquely colored for visual variety. --- **Credits** 🎨 Artist: Ovilli 💻 Developer: Ovilli --- As long as credit is given, Koifish may be used in modpacks, YouTube videos, or other content. ---
